Wrap-up 2024     You did it again

Succeeded over and over, with barely any effort. It's time
for Kivra Wrap-up 2024.

We’re not a music service. This is about documents. But before
you regret reading this, we want to say: you did it again. Broke
records. Made a difference. For the environment, for yourself,
and for quite a few fingers across the country. Only by using
Kivra! Here's the full list.

Less toxins on your fingers. About 600 kilos less, to be
precise. Many receipts still contain Bisphenol S, a substance
known to disrupt hormones. But thanks to 276 439 912 receipts
sent via Kivra this year, both you and cashiers avoided some of
these toxins. Maybe all of them, eventually. That’s what we’re
aiming for! Less toxins on your fingers. About 600 kilos less, to
be precise. Many receipts still contain Bisphenol S, a substance
known to disrupt hormones. But thanks to 276 439 912 receipts
sent via Kivra this year, both you and cashiers avoided some of
these toxins. Maybe all of them, eventually. That’s what we’re
aiming for! The entire GDP of Malta. A lot of bills were paid in
2024. That’s probably no surprise. However, what was unexpected
was that electricity bills and other expenses were paid for a
total of 289 689 971 779 SEK through Kivra. More than the entire
GDP of Malta! Good thing you only had to pay a small portion of
that. The entire GDP of Malta. A lot of bills were paid in 2024.
That’s probably no surprise. However, what was unexpected was
that electricity bills and other expenses were paid for a total
of 289 689 971 779 SEK through Kivra. More than the entire GDP of
Malta! Good thing you only had to pay a small portion of that. A
typical black hole. Imagine a generic black hole, the standard
model. It holds quite a bit. Yet, this year’s mailings in Kivra
would cover 0.82% of its surface. Sounds small? Compare it to an
area of 2 827 433 388 square meters. Or just move on to the next
point. A typical black hole. Imagine a generic black hole, the
standard model. It holds quite a bit. Yet, this year’s mailings
in Kivra would cover 0.82% of its surface. Sounds small? Compare
it to an area of 2 827 433 388 square meters. Or just move on to
the next point. Flyers the size of Slottsskogen. This year, quite
a few flyers were read in Kivra. In physical form, they would
cover an area of 1 052 647 square meters. Roughly the size of
Slottsskogen in Gothenburg, in other words. One day, when flyers
on the hallway floor are a distant memory, we’ll get back to you
with a new number. Flyers the size of Slottsskogen. This year,
quite a few flyers were read in Kivra. In physical form, they
would cover an area of 1 052 647 square meters. Roughly the size
of Slottsskogen in Gothenburg, in other words. One day, when
flyers on the hallway floor are a distant memory, we’ll get back
to you with a new number. Love in its most practical form. In
sickness, health, and administration. This year, you helped each
other. 238 340 people share their Kivra with loved ones. Almost
as many as the combined populations of Jönköping, Boden, and
Norrtälje, helping their partner with the electricity bill,
assisting grandpa with his tax return, or keeping track of their
teenager’s first (digital) envelopes. Nice, isn’t it? Love in its
most practical form. In sickness, health, and administration.
This year, you helped each other. 238 340 people share their
Kivra with loved ones. Almost as many as the combined populations
of Jönköping, Boden, and Norrtälje, helping their partner with
the electricity bill, assisting grandpa with his tax return, or
keeping track of their teenager’s first (digital) envelopes.
Nice, isn’t it? Merry Christmas & Happy New Year! Merry Christmas
& Happy New Year!     Image  Thanks, but no thanks? Here,
